g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
Alberta’s rental sector remains one of the most active in Canada as record construction continues. Vacancy rates
edged up to around 3.0% by mid
2025, reflecting sustained completions in Calgary, Edmonton, and secondary cities.
While advertised rents have softened slightly, rents for occupied units continue rising modestly. Affordability
income ratios climbing toward the mid
